summary: Dopamine increases heart muscle contraction at these lower doses through multiple receptor activations; thus, it enhances cardiac output without significant vasoconstriction or pressor effects typical at higher dosages. The main effect here is improved myocardial function with minimal peripheral vascular changes. \boxed{C}
